free_text: Measurements of differential cross sections for the
placed 3.0 cm from the neutron producing target at
the centre of a scattering chamber.
Two telescopes each of which consists of:
- Two gas proportional counters (Ar+5% of CO2, 100
Torr) as dE detector for alpha detection.
- Two Si detectors as dE and E detectors for proton,
NE213 liquid scintillator at 0 deg and
Si p-i-n photodiode at 90 deg as neutron monitors
Si p-i-n photodiode for associated alpha detection
